query_intent: Compare weekly item revenue consistency across store, catalog, and web channels for the week containing 2001-03-24, returning items whose channel revenues are all within +/-10% of each other.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate store revenue per item for the target week.
Aggregate catalog revenue per item for the target week.
Aggregate web revenue per item for the target week.
Join per-channel item revenues, enforce pairwise +/-10% consistency across all channels, and report each item with channel deviations from the cross-channel average.
